comment: Coherent pairwise meta-analyses — each specifies a SINGLE intervention (drug class) vs control, so the pooled estimate answers a well-posed clinical question (the multi-persona review flagged earlier intervention-agnostic pools as uninterpretable mega-averages). Cohorts are intervention-filtered in the engine.

analyses.estimand: hazard ratio for all-cause mortality with SGLT2 inhibitors
hazard ratio for cardiovascular death with MRAs
hazard ratio for all-cause mortality with beta-blockers
hazard ratio for MACE with SGLT2 inhibitors
hazard ratio for MACE with GLP-1 receptor agonists
hazard ratio for the renal composite with SGLT2 inhibitors
hazard ratio for all-cause mortality with anticoagulants
